class.name: volcaniarm_controller/RLVisionPolicyController
class.description: Vision RL policy controller. Subscribes to a camera image topic, runs the bundled (ResNet18 + actor) ONNX exported by IsaacLab's Volcaniarm-Reach-Vision-v0 task, and writes position targets to the two actuated elbow joints. Sibling of RLPolicyController.
